title: Silicone Jar Opener Gripper Pad, Jar Grippers for Opening Jars, Get A Grip Rubber Bottle Opener Gripper Pad, Round Multi-Purpose Non Slip Heat Insulation Bottle Lid Openers for Seniors Kids 2 Pieces
description:
SIZE - This round silicone jar opener gripper pad diameter approximately 4.92 inches, thickness approximately 0.06 inches.
PREMIUM SILICONE - This silicone jar openers are made of high-quality silicone, resistant to twist, not easy to tear, sturdy and have no odor, can use for a long time.
MULTIFUNCTIONAL USEFUL - This silicone jar opener gripper pad will make it easy to loosen any jar or bottle without straining your hands, they are not only applied for opening jars and bottles easily, but also can work as round kitchen coasters, anti-scald pads or anything stuck that needs great friction, also great for wrapping hot handle/lids on the stovetop.
APPLICATION - Children can open their favorite cookie jars, and elderly folk will open medicine bottles and jars with ease. Are a perfect home and kitchen tool for the elderly or those with hand difficulty, it makes opening jars and medicine bottles much easier, effective and safe.
PERFECT GIFT - Specially designed theme pattern, great idea for a gift for family, teacher, friends, colleague, classmate, perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, weddings, anniversary, thanksgiving, Christmas, mother's day, father's day or any holiday occasion. Everyone will be happy to have a decorative, functional silicone jar opener gripper pad.
reviews_5s: I can now open jars with no problem. Thank you!Exactly as advertised and works just as expected.These cute little grippers work perfectly for those tough jars! Added the second one to my tool kit for when I need a good grip.This item helps anyone open a jar easily since it does not slip and your hand grips the top of the jar. It is a real kitchen helper.Makes opening jars easyBought for a friendArrived on time as expected. Description of product was correct. Bought this to replace my current one, this one works well and is much cuter than the one I have’s glad it came with 2This makes opening a jar SO EASY! highly recommend itThese are great grippers for opening jars, and they make me smile every time I use them. They are worth the money for the smile factor alone.Finally something that lets me open any jar with no difficulty whatsoever. Thank you!!
reviews_1s: These are cute but they don’t grip at all. Don’t waste your money.Doesn’t work as a Gripper! Too slick- cute but not functional, so?!Too thick & strong chemical odorThese are very cute. The reason I wouldnt recommend is with the first use, the wording starts to rub off on your hand.The msg is cute but they dont work, so not functional. Back side is as slick as the front side. I’m 83.Needs ridges on this to grip the bottle top. A waste of money
